subcodes.first_line: O twin confidants! Though brief, thy letter was comprehensive. The mysteries of love are secrets of the heart, beyond the perception of hearing and sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو همراز نامه مختصر مفصل بود اسرار عشق راز دل است نه محسوس سمع و بصر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @symbolism of color and light, @knowledge of self
